style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. On the left, a panel labelled DEVELOPER VIEW showing one box labelled VM with a few small agent dots, watched by a simple eye icon. On the right, a wider panel labelled ADMIN VIEW showing a three-by-three grid of small boxes each labelled VM with agent dots, all beneath one larger eye icon labelled OBSERVE AND AUDIT ALL. In a small inset between them, one robot icon labelled AUDIT AGENT points an eye line at another robot icon labelled AGENT, with a caption AGENTS AUDITING AGENTS. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people beyond schematic icons. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
